zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffrey Dene de Eyden於1170年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾科華士 本 迪恩 農康福米斯特時，他的父親William de Dene II28歲，母親Matilda22歲。他於大約1192年與Petronilla在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾科華士 本 迪恩結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1209年在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾科華士 本 迪恩享年39歲。

nameMeanings.name: Dene
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Dahn
meanings: habitational name from a place in the Palatinate called Dahn.
(Dähn): ethnic name for a Dane, from Old Norse Dan-.

variants.name: Dean
meanings: English: topographic name from Middle English dene ‘valley’ (Old English denu), or a habitational name from any of several places in various parts of England named Dean or Dene from this word.

English: nickname or occupational name for the servant of a dean or nickname for someone thought to resemble a dean. A dean was an ecclesiastical official, the head of a chapter of canons or a church official with jurisdiction over a sub-division of an archdeaconry. Though no doubt some deans had illegitimate children, they were officially celibate, and in the main the surname is probably a nickname in origin, similar to Bishop , Prior , Priest , and Monk . The Middle English word deen, dien, dein, is a borrowing of Old French d(e)ien, doien from Latin decanus (originally a leader of ten men, from decem ‘ten’), and thus is a cognate of Deacon .
English: from the Middle English personal name Deyne (or Dene) a rhyming pet form of Reynald (see Reginald ).

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffrey Dene de Eyden was born in 1170, in Forest of Dean Nonconformist, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Dene II, was 28 and his mother, Matilda, was 22. He married Petronilla about 1192, in Forest of Dean, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1209, in Forest of Dean, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 39.

Il a épousé Petronilla environ 1192, à Forest of Dean, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. ko.Forest of Dean, Gloucestershire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 포레스트 프 디
ko.lifeSummary: Geoffrey Dene de Eyden(이)가 1170년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 포레스트 프 디 넌콘포미스트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Dene II(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1192년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 포레스트 프 디에서 Petronilla(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1209년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 포레스트 프 디에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Forest of Dean, Gloucestershire, England: форест оф дин, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.Forest of Dean Nonconformist, Gloucester: форест оф дин нонконформист, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.Forest of Dean, Gloucestershire, England: форест оф дин, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffrey Dene de Eyden родился в 1170 г. в местности форест оф дин нонконформист, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Dene II было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Petronilla около 1192 г. в местности форест оф дин, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1209 г. в местности форест оф дин, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 39 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Geoffrey Dene de Eyden nació en 1170, en Forest of Dean Nonconformist, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Dene II, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Matilda, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Petronilla aproximadamente 1192, en Forest of Dean, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1209, en Forest of Dean, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 39 años.
